articles.title: Why Ripple XRP is DOOMED & Bitcoin Will Hit $10 Million
articles.description: A lot of hype following the SEC Ripple XRP ruling but Joe Carlasare and others break down why this ruling is likely Garlinghouse and Xrp Army's demise!! Are all altcoins destined to go to zero against Bitcoin? Why does Microstrategy Chairman Michael Saylor foresee $10,000,000 Bitcoin?! You don't want to miss this one!!
